channel.title: The Moon Exports - Product Updates
channel.description: Latest product updates and new arrivals from The Moon Exports - Premium handicrafts exporter from Sambhal, India

image.title: The Moon Exports
image.description: Premium handicrafts exporter from Sambhal, India

item.title: New Buffalo Horn Plates Collection Available
item.description: Discover our latest collection of premium buffalo horn plates in brown, black, and light colors. Perfect for restaurants and luxury dining.

item.title: Handcrafted Buffalo Horn Bowls - Natural Antibacterial Properties
item.description: Our buffalo horn bowls feature natural antibacterial properties and unique grain patterns. Ideal for food service and decorative use.

item.title: Horn Accessories - Jewelry and Fashion Items
item.description: Explore our extensive collection of horn accessories including bracelets, pendants, and fashion jewelry. Each piece uniquely crafted.
